message:
Refactor demo data generator into demo package (#138)

* Refactor demo data generator into demo package

Extract data generation logic into user-defined operators
(demo::zeek and demo::suricata) with a speed parameter. The
deployed pipelines now call these operators and publish to
their respective topics.

- Rename package from demo-data-generator to demo
- Add operators/zeek.tql and operators/suricata.tql as UDOs
- Simplify pipelines to thin orchestration wrappers

* Use from_http and add descriptions for UDOs

Switch both operators from the from/http pattern to from_http and
move filtering, sorting, and delay to top-level pipeline steps.
Add operator descriptions using folded YAML scalars.

files.patch:
@@ -1,27 +0,0 @@
----
-name: Zeek Demo Data
-description: |
-  Publishes a live demo data feed to the `zeek` topic.
-restart-on-error: 1min
----
-
-let $speed = {{ inputs.speed }}
-let $first = 2021-11-18T10:00:00Z
-let $last = 2021-11-19T01:00:00Z
-let $default = 3h
-let $period = $default / $speed
-let $factor = ($last - $first) / $period
-
-every $period {
-  from {
-    url: "https://datasets.tenzir.tools/M57/zeek-all.log.zst",
-  }
-}
-http url {
-  decompress_zstd
-  read_zeek_tsv
-  where $first <= ts and ts <= $last
-  sort ts
-  delay ts, start=$first, speed=$factor
-}
-publish "zeek"

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+---
+description: >-
+  Generates a continuous stream of Suricata events from the M57 dataset,
+  replayed in real time. Use `speed` to control the replay rate.
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: speed
+      type: double
+      default: 1.0
+---
+
+let $first = 2021-11-18T08:10:00Z
+let $last = 2021-11-18T08:38:00Z
+let $default = 30s
+let $period = $default / $speed
+let $factor = ($last - $first) / $period
+
+every $period {
+  from_http "https://datasets.tenzir.tools/M57/suricata.json.zst" {
+    decompress_zstd
+    read_suricata
+    head 30k
+  }
+}
+where $first <= timestamp and timestamp <= $last
+sort timestamp
+// Drop some very frequent data to get a more even distribution.
+if @name == "suricata.dns" {
+  if random() > 0.01 {
+    discard
+  }
+} else if @name == "suricata.tls" {
+  if random() > 0.3 {
+    discard
+  }
+}
+delay timestamp, start=$first, speed=$factor

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+---
+description: >-
+  Generates a continuous stream of Zeek events from the M57 dataset,
+  replayed in real time. Use `speed` to control the replay rate.
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: speed
+      type: double
+      default: 1.0
+---
+
+let $first = 2021-11-18T10:00:00Z
+let $last = 2021-11-19T01:00:00Z
+let $default = 3h
+let $period = $default / $speed
+let $factor = ($last - $first) / $period
+
+every $period {
+  from_http "https://datasets.tenzir.tools/M57/zeek-all.log.zst" {
+    decompress_zstd
+    read_zeek_tsv
+  }
+}
+where $first <= ts and ts <= $last
+sort ts
+delay ts, start=$first, speed=$factor

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-id: demo-data-generator
-name: Demo Data Generator
+id: demo
+name: Demo
 author: Tenzir
 author_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/.tenzir.svg
-package_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/demo-data-generator/package.svg
+package_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/demo/package.svg
 
 description: |
   This package provides a live Zeek and Suricata event feed for demo purposes.

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+name: Suricata Demo Data
+description: |
+  Publishes a live demo data feed to the `suricata` topic.
+restart-on-error: 1min
+---
+
+demo::suricata speed={{ inputs.speed }}
+publish "suricata"

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+name: Zeek Demo Data
+description: |
+  Publishes a live demo data feed to the `zeek` topic.
+restart-on-error: 1min
+---
+
+demo::zeek speed={{ inputs.speed }}
+publish "zeek"
